entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A severe abiotic stress caused by lack of water, reducing plant development and crop yield

entities.name: PLANT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and maturation process of plants, which is reduced by drought stress

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that negatively impact plants, including drought stress

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global environmental shifts that contribute to the increase in abiotic stresses

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area, reduced by drought stress

entities.name: FOOD SHORTAGES
entities.description: Lack of sufficient food supply resulting from reduced crop yields

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand and produce under drought conditions

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL APPROACH
entities.description: Traditional methods of plant development that are time-consuming and tedious

entities.name: CRISPR/CAS
entities.description: A cutting-edge gene editing tool used for developing drought-tolerant plants

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: A broad category of techniques used to modify DNA, of which CRISPR/Cas is a prominent tool
